$schema_note: Conforms to ADR-025 + ADR-026; inherits layout-wiring shape from cycle_104_d11_hero_wire_learn_how.json (1st canonical instance of no-image-gen cycle JSON).

step_1_capture_state.target_surface: site/src/pages/{patterns,reference}/index.astro (wire 2 of 4 hero PNGs produced at cycle 102; same Props extension consumed from cycle 104)
step_1_capture_state.method: agentic discovery via Read tool + md5 fingerprint of pre-change files

pre_change_inventory.documentation_layout_state: heroImage prop extension LIVE at HEAD 5d135f1 (cycle 104); no further layout changes needed
section_index_pages_pre_change: site/src/pages/patterns/index.astro (29 lines; passes title + description + jsonLD; reads patterns via getDocsBySection)
site/src/pages/reference/index.astro (46 lines; passes title + description + jsonLD; reads refs via getSortedReference + resourceCards literal)
pre_change_inventory.carry_forward_from_cycle_104: DocumentationLayout Props now accepts heroImage?: { src: ImageMetadata; alt: string }; consumers pass via heroImage={{ src, alt }}

step_1_capture_state.scope_decision: Cycle 105 wires the remaining 2 of 4 hero PNGs (patterns + reference) into their section index pages. Pure consumer-side change — no layout modification; reuses the heroImage prop extension established at cycle 104. Same eager-loading + responsive widths + informational-decorative alt pattern.

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated; Q&A focus carry-forward from cycle 104 (placement/sizing/responsiveness/a11y validated; cycle 105 personas evaluate whether the patterns + reference heroes specifically benefit from the same wiring discipline).
step_2_persona_qa.qa_protocol_focus: Q1 Visual Style (alt-text accuracy for hexagonal-tessellation + blueprint-grid motifs) + Q5 Explanation Quality (do these specific heroes earn their above-fold position, or do they crowd the dense card-grid content below?)
step_2_persona_qa.design_question_at_cycle_entry: Reference + patterns pages have denser content than learn/how (collection-driven card grids with 8-15 cards each). Does the hero band add or subtract value when the user is already past the OG-share recognition phase and deep-linking into structured navigation?

persona_consensus.design_critic: Add. Even with dense cards below, the hero gives the page a visual identity that distinguishes /reference from /patterns at a glance — without it, all 6 section index pages would look interchangeable on first scan. The hero is the 'this is what this section is about' signal that no amount of card-grid affordance can substitute for.
persona_consensus.visual_designer: Add. hero_reference (blueprint grid) is the strongest hero in the set per cycle 102 step_6 — densest geometric activity, most narrative weight; deserves above-fold position. hero_patterns (hexagonal tessellation) carries the strongest motif-vocabulary match to its content type (tessellation literally is a 'pattern' visual). Both earn their position.
persona_consensus.newcomer_stress_tester: Add. From OG-share → /patterns, hero_patterns is the recognition signal. For deep-link entries (e.g., direct nav to /reference), the hero still serves a 'section identity at a glance' function. Cognitive_Load is reduced by the hero, not increased.
persona_consensus.accessibility_auditor: Add — provided alt text is informational-decorative hybrid (not empty). Inform alt='Hexagonal tessellation motif representing aDNA architectural patterns' + alt='Blueprint grid motif with dimensional callouts representing aDNA specification reference' per cycle 104 discipline.

step_2_persona_qa.qa_synthesis: 4/4 personas converge on add-the-hero. Apply cycle 104 wiring discipline verbatim (import → pass heroImage prop → 1-line motif-grounded informational-decorative alt). No regens needed; cycle 102 already passed asset-level validation.

step_3_generate_or_regen_images.decision: NO image generation — cycle 105 is layout-wiring only (same scope shape as cycle 104).

files_modified: site/src/pages/patterns/index.astro (import heroPatterns from ../../assets/heroes/hero_patterns.png; pass heroImage={{ src: heroPatterns, alt: 'Hexagonal tessellation motif representing aDNA architectural patterns' }})

site/src/pages/reference/index.astro (import heroReference from ../../assets/heroes/hero_reference.png; pass heroImage={{ src: heroReference, alt: 'Blueprint grid motif with dimensional callouts representing aDNA specification reference' }})
step_4_implement.implementation_notes: Cleanest possible cycle — 2 imports + 2 prop additions; zero further changes to layout, components, or styles. Reuses cycle 104 infrastructure verbatim. skill_documentation_layout_props_additive_extension advances 1/3 → 2/3 (cycle 104 1st instance + cycle 105 2nd instance with zero modification beyond consumer-side prop pass).

step_5_recapture.method: Astro production build + image-pipeline log inspection
post_change_artifacts: /_astro/hero_patterns.BSeC2zsM_wqtmN.webp (7 KB) + 1FoKbw (15 KB) + Z28Rqmy (23 KB) + L4maD (26 KB) — 4 responsive webp variants
/_astro/hero_reference.BNvTxTVV_13VzXg.webp (8 KB) + 12tSQG (16 KB) + Z2hgn3l (23 KB) + 2sd40c (27 KB) — 4 responsive webp variants
step_5_recapture.build_result: 152 pages built in 5.26s; 26 images optimized in 171ms (18 reused cache + 8 fresh for patterns + reference variants); 0 type errors; 0 a11y warnings

step_6_validate.method: Astro production build (npm run build) exits 0 + persona post-change scoring

persona_specific_post_change_notes.design_critic: Visual rhythm consistent with cycle 104 wiring; all 4 section index pages (learn/how/patterns/reference) now have above-fold hero confirmation. Section-identity-at-a-glance achieved. Score 4.5/5.0 Visual_Clarity.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.visual_designer: hero_reference + hero_patterns produce 27 + 26 KB at the largest responsive variant (1408w) — smallest of the 4 heroes despite being the densest motifs (good webp compression on geometric line art). Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.newcomer_stress_tester: From OG-share → any of /learn, /how, /patterns, /reference, the hero band lands within first viewport scan with matching motif. Recognition discipline complete for 4 of 6 sections (community + use-cases deferred — out of S2 scope; future cycle if/when their hero assets are produced). Score 4.0/5.0 Cognitive_Load.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.accessibility_auditor: All 4 alt texts are informational-decorative hybrid 1-liners; screen readers will surface motif context without overdescribing. Score 4.5/5.0 Visual_Clarity.

lift_avoid_verification.m51_d11_lift_1_philosophy_before_feature: HONORED — pattern grid + spec blueprint are both architectural/technical motifs; no marketing chrome.
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d11_avoid_2_marketing_style_hero_ima: AVOIDED — no human figures, no aspirational compositions, no photographic stock-photo aesthetic.

step_6_validate.cycle_acceptance: PASS — 2/4 remaining heroes wired (patterns + reference); build clean at 152 pages 5.26s; 4 of 4 cycle-102 hero PNGs now consumed; persona post-change aggregate identical to cycle 104 (4.0-4.5 across all 4 dimensions); LIFT-1 honored + AVOID-2 avoided.

step_7_record_iii_result.schema_conformance_adr_025_026: Conforms; inherits cycle 104 layout-wiring shape; cycles 102 (asset gen) + 104+105 (wiring) demonstrate the asset-then-wiring 2-step pattern for hero work.

lift_carried_forward_to_cycle_106: Pure consumer-side prop-pass pattern (no further layout changes once Props extension lands) is reusable for icon-in-band wiring if cycle 106 surfaces that need
informational-decorative alt-text discipline (1-line motif description + 'representing aDNA X') transfers to icon alt-text vocabulary
avoid_carried_forward: Do NOT batch hero wiring across 4 sections in a single cycle — splitting at 2+2 across cycles 104+105 allowed cycle 104 to land + verify the layout-Props extension before cycle 105 consumed it. Same pattern recommended if/when community + use-cases heroes get authored (defer to future cycle)
lift_avoid_routing.skill_documentation_layout_props_additiv: 1/3 → 2/3 (cycle 104 1st canonical instance + cycle 105 2nd canonical instance with zero modification beyond consumer prop-pass; promotes to 3/3 at next reuse — could be icon-band, marketing layout if/when authored, or any future shared layout that grows an optional prop)
